Entries.UsedFor: Wild Apricot GET /accounts/{accountId}/contacts response envelope shape (Contacts[] wrapper + ProfileLastUpdated watermark field + FieldValues[] custom fields). All PII scrubbed.
Entries.Excerpt: Response: { ContactsCount, Contacts: [ { Id, FirstName, LastName, Email, Organization, DisplayName, ProfileLastUpdated, FieldValues: [...] } ] }

Entries.UsedFor: Wild Apricot GET /accounts/{accountId}/events response envelope shape (Events[] wrapper + LastUpdated watermark). All PII scrubbed.
Entries.Excerpt: Response: { Events: [ { Id, Name, StartDate, EndDate, Location, LastUpdated } ] }

Entries.UsedFor: Wild Apricot GET /accounts/{accountId}/membershiplevels returns a bare root array (no wrapper).
Wild Apricot OAuth2 client_credentials token-endpoint response shape (access_token / expires_in).
Entries.Excerpt: POST oauth.wildapricot.org/auth/token, grant_type=client_credentials, clientId=APIKEY, scope=auto → { access_token, token_type: Bearer, expires_in }

Entries.UsedFor: Wild Apricot async Contacts pattern: $async=true returns ResultUrl + RequestFinished; poll until Contacts present.
Entries.Excerpt: GET /contacts?$async=true → { State, ResultId, ResultUrl }; poll ResultUrl until { Contacts: [...] }
